assets.name: Curie Logo White
assets.description: Curie C logomark — stylized letter C with curved notch and extending tail, white filled
assets.context: Sidebar navigation logo, always visible at top of side-nav

assets.name: Curie Logo White (Large)
assets.description: Larger version of the Curie C logomark, white filled, same swirl shape without clip-path
assets.context: Available for marketing materials, splash screens, or larger branding placements

assets.name: Home Icon
assets.description: House icon with peaked roof and rectangular door cutout, white stroked outline
assets.context: Alternative home icon for sidebar navigation (inline SVG version used instead)

assets.name: Brief Icon
assets.description: Rounded square with three horizontal text lines inside, representing medical briefs and articles
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Briefs section (inactive state)

assets.name: Podcast Icon
assets.description: Headphones icon with over-ear cups and connecting headband arc, white stroked outline
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Podcasts section (inactive state)

assets.name: Game Icon
assets.description: Game controller with D-pad on left and two circular buttons on right, white stroked outline
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Games section (inactive state)

assets.name: Newsletter Icon
assets.description: Envelope/mail icon with rectangular body and V-shaped flap line, white stroked outline
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Newsletter section (inactive state)

assets.name: Media / Editorial Icon
assets.description: Microphone with radiating sound lines, ear cup, and circular knob — represents media/broadcast with gradient fills (teal to pink to purple)
assets.context: Page header icon for the Editorial section, displayed next to 'Curie Editorial' title

assets.name: Curie Brief Section Icon
assets.description: Brief-related icon inside a pill/capsule-shaped rounded rect, used for Briefs section headers
assets.context: Page header icon for the Briefs section, displayed next to 'Curie Brief' title

assets.name: Podcast Section Icon
assets.description: Podcast-themed icon with equalizer bars inside a square frame (embedded raster)

assets.name: Up Arrow
assets.description: Upward-pointing chevron arrow for upvote/like interactions

assets.name: Bookmark Icon
assets.description: Bookmark ribbon icon with pointed bottom tab, light gray filled

assets.description: Mental healthcare themed illustration with multiple human figures and gradient elements (embedded raster)
